tasks.name: Create DashboardWidgetPlaceholder component skeleton
tasks.purpose: Create reusable placeholder component with Card, Skeleton, size variants, and dev-mode label support

constraints: Component should be server component (no 'use client')
Three size variants: small (200px), medium (280px), large (320px)
Each instance needs unique data-testid prop
Use semantic Tailwind classes: bg-card, text-card-foreground, text-muted-foreground

tasks.input_state: _components directory exists but no placeholder component
tasks.output_state: DashboardWidgetPlaceholder component exists with size variants and dev label support
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Component file exists with Card + Skeleton structure, size variants, and label prop
tasks.verification_command: test -f apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_components/dashboard-widget-placeholder.tsx && grep -q 'small.*200' apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_components/dashboard-widget-placeholder.tsx && grep -q 'process.env.NODE_ENV' apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_components/dashboard-widget-placeholder.tsx && pnpm typecheck --filter web

tasks.name: Replace 6 widget Cards with DashboardWidgetPlaceholder instances
tasks.purpose: Import DashboardWidgetPlaceholder and replace generic Card placeholders with sized placeholder instances

constraints: Add import at top of file: import { DashboardWidgetPlaceholder } from './_components/dashboard-widget-placeholder'
Row 1 (3 widgets): Progress Overview (medium), Task Completion (medium), Activity Summary (medium)
Row 2 (3 widgets): Recent Tasks (large), Quick Actions (small), Upcoming Sessions (medium)
Each placeholder needs unique data-testid: dashboard-widget-progress, dashboard-widget-tasks, etc.
Use label prop for dev-mode display names

tasks.input_state: Page has 6 generic Card placeholders from F1, no DashboardWidgetPlaceholder import
tasks.output_state: Page imports DashboardWidgetPlaceholder and uses 6 instances with proper sizing, labels, test IDs
tasks.acceptance_criterion: 6 DashboardWidgetPlaceholder components exist with unique data-testid attributes and appropriate sizes
tasks.verification_command: grep -q "import.*DashboardWidgetPlaceholder.*from.*_components" apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/page.tsx && grep -c 'DashboardWidgetPlaceholder' apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/page.tsx | grep -q '^6$' && grep -q 'data-testid="dashboard-widget-progress"' apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/page.tsx && pnpm typecheck --filter web

tasks.name: Update presentations section with DashboardWidgetPlaceholder
tasks.purpose: Replace presentations Card placeholder with DashboardWidgetPlaceholder using large size

constraints: Use large size variant for presentations
Keep lg:col-span-3 wrapper for full-width layout

tasks.input_state: Presentations section exists as generic Card placeholder with lg:col-span-3
tasks.output_state: Presentations section uses DashboardWidgetPlaceholder with large size and proper test ID
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Presentations placeholder is DashboardWidgetPlaceholder with data-testid and lg:col-span-3 wrapper
tasks.verification_command: grep -Pzo 'lg:col-span-3[^>]*>[^<]*<DashboardWidgetPlaceholder' apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/page.tsx && grep -q 'data-testid="dashboard-widget-presentations"' apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/page.tsx && pnpm typecheck --filter web
